author: y4rr
content: Plan: Write GPU kernels for cumsum/cumprod/cummax/cummin/logcumsumexp. These are sequential scan ops so each element depends on the previous — a full parallel prefix sum (Blelloch) is complex. Strategy: one thread per (outer, inner) pair, sequential scan along dim_size. One block per row. For typical training (reduce along sequence/feature dim), this is sufficient since the parallelism comes from the outer*inner parallel scans. Add GpuBackend trait methods, backend_impl overrides, and dispatch in cumulative.rs.
